name: Khamrah
description: An oriental vanilla masterpiece that opens with dried fruits and spices, leading to Turkish rose and praline, resting on oud, vanilla, and tonka bean.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540
description: A luminous composition built around saffron, jasmine, and ambergris. A modern classic.

name: Interlude Man
description: A powerful smoky-incense composition capturing controlled chaos.

name: Oud for Greatness
description: A bold oud-saffron composition with unexpected lavender freshness.

name: Oud Wood
description: The fragrance that introduced oud to mainstream Western perfumery.

name: Raghba
description: A warm, inviting oriental with prominent vanilla, oud, and balsamic notes.

name: Oud for Glory
description: A bold oriental oud composition frequently compared to Initio's Oud for Greatness.

name: Reflection Man
description: An elegant floral-woody composition. Jasmine and iris create sophistication.

name: Hacivat
description: A fresh woody-fruity composition often compared to Creed Aventus.

name: Layton
description: A rich spicy-vanilla composition with apple and cardamom.

name: Aventus
description: The modern king of fragrances. Fruity, smoky, woody composition.

name: Amber Oud Gold Edition
description: A luxurious amber-oud composition with prominent saffron and vanilla.

name: Grand Soir
description: An amber dream. Warm benzoin and vanilla wrapped in a sophisticated cocoon.

name: Tobacco Vanilla
description: A warm, spicy, opulent blend of tobacco leaf with vanilla and tonka bean.

name: Midnight Oud
description: A dark, mysterious oud composition with smoky incense and warm amber.

name: Asad
description: A bold smoky-sweet fragrance with tobacco, vanilla, and oud.

name: Jubilation XXV
description: A majestic oriental celebrating Amouage's 25th anniversary.

name: Intense Oud
description: A pure, powerful oud experience with rose and musk.

name: Shaheen
description: A fresh modern take on Arabian perfumery with citrus and oud.

name: Oud Silk Mood
description: An exquisite blend of oud with Bulgarian rose and satin-smooth vanilla.

name: Yara
description: A sweet gourmand floral with tropical orchid, tangerine, and caramel on a vanilla-musk base. An Arabian crowd-pleaser.

name: Qaed Al Fursan
description: A bold leather-oud composition with herbal sage and warm amber. Evokes Arabian horseback tradition.

name: Ana Abiyedh
description: A clean, white musk fragrance with delicate rose and sandalwood. Perfect for layering.

name: Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst
description: A rich plum-oud oriental with raspberry sweetness and smoky amber depth.

name: Supremacy Silver
description: A fresh, fruity-woody composition inspired by the Aventus archetype. Pineapple and birch dominate.

name: 9PM
description: A sweet, spicy-vanilla night fragrance with apple, cinnamon, and lavender. An Arabian take on the sweet masculine genre.

name: Turathi Blue
description: A fresh aquatic-woody fragrance with citrus opening and ambergris dry-down.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Man
description: The most popular Aventus-inspired fragrance. Smoky pineapple-birch composition with enormous projection.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Woman
description: A citrus-floral composition with smoky undertones. Lemon, rose, and patchouli create a sophisticated blend.

name: Sillage
description: A sweet fruity-floral with strong sillage. Coconut, vanilla, and iris create a creamy tropical composition.

name: Shaghaf Oud
description: An opulent oud-rose-saffron composition embodying traditional Arabian luxury.

name: Kashkha
description: A warm amber-vanilla oriental with saffron and sandalwood. Sweet, smooth, and long-lasting.

name: L'Aventure
description: A refined fruity-woody composition with pineapple, birch, and ambergris. A respected Aventus alternative.

name: Amber Oud Rouge
description: A luxurious saffron-oud composition with red fruits, rose, and warm amber. Rich and velvety.

name: La Yuqawam
description: A bold smoky-leather composition with oud, saffron, and plum. Often compared to Tuscan Leather.

name: Hawas
description: A fresh aquatic-sweet fragrance with bergamot, apple, and ambergris. Ideal for warm climates.

name: Noya Oud is My Love
description: A gourmand-oud creation blending sweet vanilla and praline with dark oud and incense.

name: Heritage
description: A classic Arabian amber-oud composition honoring traditional Gulf perfumery.

name: Resala
description: A delicate floral-woody composition with rose, oud, and sandalwood. Elegant and refined.

name: No. 5
description: The most iconic perfume in history. An abstract floral aldehyde composition that redefined modern perfumery.

name: Bleu de Chanel
description: A woody-aromatic composition embodying freedom and determination. Cedar, sandalwood, and incense over citrus.

name: Coco Mademoiselle
description: A fresh oriental for the modern woman. Orange, rose, and patchouli in an irresistibly elegant blend.

name: Allure Homme Sport
description: A dynamic, fresh, and clean sport fragrance with neroli, cedar, and white musk.

name: Sauvage
description: A raw, noble composition built around Calabrian bergamot and Ambroxan. The best-selling men's fragrance worldwide.

name: Miss Dior
description: A floral bouquet of Grasse rose and peony with a warm, velvety base.

name: J'adore
description: A luminous floral bouquet of ylang-ylang, rose, and jasmine. Timeless feminine elegance.

name: Fahrenheit
description: A revolutionary composition blending gasoline, leather, and violets. Bold and unlike anything else.

name: Eros
description: A fresh, sweet, and powerful composition inspired by Greek mythology. Mint, vanilla, and cedar dominate.

name: Dylan Blue
description: A Mediterranean aromatic fougere with incense, tonka bean, and musk.

name: La Nuit de l'Homme
description: A seductive, sweet-spicy composition with cardamom and lavender. The quintessential date night fragrance.

name: Libre
description: A daring lavender-orange blossom composition with vanilla warmth. Feminine freedom in a bottle.

name: Acqua di Gio
description: The defining aquatic fragrance. Fresh sea notes with bergamot and white musk. A timeless classic.

name: Si
description: A chic neo-chypre with blackcurrant, rose, and vanilla. Modern Italian elegance.

name: Armani Code
description: A sensual oriental with olive blossom, star anise, and tonka bean. Smooth and seductive.

name: The One
description: A sophisticated oriental spicy fragrance with ginger, tobacco, and amber. Warm and refined.

name: Light Blue
description: A sparkling Mediterranean citrus-floral capturing Sicilian summer. Apple, cedar, and white rose.

name: Le Male
description: An iconic fresh oriental with lavender, vanilla, and mint. The torso-shaped bottle is unmistakable.

name: Le Male Le Parfum
description: An intensified version of Le Male with cardamom, iris, and vanilla. Deeper and more sensual.

name: Shalimar
description: The first oriental fragrance in history. A legendary vanilla-incense composition inspired by the gardens of Shalimar.

name: L'Homme Ideal
description: A sophisticated blend of almond, leather, and cherry. A gourmand take on the ideal gentleman.

name: Gentle Fluidity Gold
description: A warm, sweet, musky vanilla composition with coriander and musks. Genderless fluidity.

name: Petit Matin
description: A bright, joyful citrus-musk composition evoking a fresh Parisian morning.

name: Aqua Universalis
description: A clean, luminous composition of white flowers and citrus. The essence of purity.

name: Pegasus
description: A creamy almond-vanilla composition with heliotrope and sandalwood. Sweet sophistication.

name: Sedley
description: A fresh, green, and ozonic composition with mint, geranium, and lavender. Clean and invigorating.

name: Delina
description: A bright floral-fruity composition with Turkish rose, peony, and vanilla. Feminine and radiant.

name: Side Effect
description: An addictive gourmand with rum, tobacco, and vanilla. Smoky, sweet, and intoxicating.

name: Musk Therapy
description: A pure, enveloping skin-musk composition with rose and sandalwood. Intimate and healing.

name: Naxos
description: A stunning tobacco-honey-lavender composition. Sweet, aromatic, and deeply addictive.

name: Erba Pura
description: A fruity-amber explosion with orange, bergamot, and musk. Joyful, sweet, and universally loved.

name: Alexandria II
description: A refined floral-amber composition with iris, sandalwood, and benzoin. Elegant and regal.

name: Love Don't Be Shy
description: A marshmallow-sweet composition with orange blossom and vanilla. Soft, feminine, and irresistible.

name: Good Girl Gone Bad
description: A narcotic white floral with jasmine, tuberose, and rose absolute. Feminine power in a bottle.

name: Intense Cafe
description: A gourmand coffee-rose composition with vanilla and white musk. A modern Arabian coffeehouse.

name: Chocolate Greedy
description: A rich chocolate-vanilla-coffee gourmand. Decadent, warm, and utterly comforting.

name: Cedrat Boise
description: A vibrant citrus-woody composition with fruity sweetness and leather base. Versatile and long-lasting.

name: Instant Crush
description: A vibrant rose-vanilla-sandalwood composition. Sweet, elegant, and immediately captivating.

name: Red Tobacco
description: A bold tobacco-vanilla-saffron composition with dark fruits. Warm, addictive, and powerful.

name: Ani
description: A warm, spicy-vanilla composition with cardamom and bergamot. Named after the ancient Armenian city.

name: Hundred Silent Ways
description: A sophisticated powdery-amber composition with vanilla, musk, and orris. Gentle yet lasting.

name: Green Irish Tweed
description: A classic green-aromatic composition with violet leaf, iris, and sandalwood. Refined and timeless.

name: Silver Mountain Water
description: A crisp, fresh, metallic-green composition evoking alpine streams and snow-capped peaks.

name: Viking
description: A spicy-woody composition with pink pepper, bergamot, and sandalwood. Bold Nordic spirit.

name: Gypsy Water
description: A romantic, bohemian composition with bergamot, pine, and vanilla. Evokes campfires and open roads.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: A vibrant, warm composition inspired by African art and Parisian culture. Vetiver, violet, and jasmine.

name: Mojave Ghost
description: A ghostly, luminous composition with ambrette, magnolia, and sandalwood. Desert beauty in a bottle.

name: Santal 33
description: A smoky, leathery sandalwood composition with cardamom and iris. The unofficial scent of New York City.

name: Rose 31
description: A masculine take on rose with cumin, cedar, and musk. Rose deconstructed and rebuilt.

name: Another 13
description: A skin-scent masterpiece built on ambroxan, moss, and musk. Smells like your best self, amplified.

name: Jazz Club
description: A warm, smoky-boozy composition evoking a Brooklyn jazz lounge. Tobacco, rum, and pink pepper.

name: By the Fireplace
description: A cozy smoky-sweet composition capturing the crackle of a wood fireplace. Chestnut, vanilla, and guaiac wood.

name: Whispers in the Library
description: A warm, intellectual fragrance of old books, vanilla, and pepper. The scent of quiet contemplation.

name: Terre d'Hermès
description: An earthy-citrus composition with grapefruit, pepper, and vetiver. Embodies the connection between man and earth.

name: Un Jardin sur le Nil
description: A green, fresh garden composition capturing mango, lotus, and calamus along the Nile.

name: Lost Cherry
description: A luscious cherry-almond liqueur composition with dark fruits, tonka bean, and sandalwood.

name: Bitter Peach
description: A hedonistic peach-rum composition with vanilla and sandalwood. Fruity decadence.

name: Noir de Noir
description: A dark, earthy rose-oud composition with truffle, vanilla, and patchouli. Rich and gothic.

name: Black Orchid
description: A dark, luxurious composition with black truffle, ylang-ylang, and patchouli. Tom Ford's debut fragrance.

name: Kirke
description: A bright, fruity-floral composition with peach, passion fruit, and jasmine. Sweet and sophisticated.

name: Orion
description: A warm amber-musk composition with jasmine, iris, and patchouli. Celestial elegance.

name: Colonia
description: The original Italian cologne. Bright citrus with lavender, rosemary, and vetiver. Pure Mediterranean elegance.

name: Oud & Spice
description: An Italian interpretation of oud with cinnamon, pink pepper, and warm amber.

name: Halfeti
description: A smoky, dark rose-oud composition inspired by the sunken village of Halfeti in Turkey. Mysterious and opulent.

name: Endymion
description: A refined, aromatic composition with lavender, sage, and coffee. Classic British elegance.
